name: The First National Bank In Falfurrias
description_short: Community bank in South Texas offering personal and business banking services with a 100-year history. Provides checking, savings, debit cards, and mobile banking through branches in the Falfurrias area.
description_long: The First National Bank of Falfurrias is a regional bank headquartered in Falfurrias, Texas, with over 100 years of banking history serving South Texas communities. The bank operates as a traditional full-service financial institution focused on retail and small business banking in its local market. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking services including checking and savings accounts, debit cards, and mobile banking via a downloadable app. For business customers, First National Bank of Falfurrias provides commercial banking services tailored to businesses of various sizes. The institution also offers online financial calculators to help customers with loan payments, mortgage qualification, retirement planning, and savings projections. What distinguishes this bank is its emphasis on fraud protection through proactive debit card alerts. Customers are automatically enrolled in enhanced fraud detection services that send alerts via text, email, and phone calls when suspicious transactions are identified. The bank absorbs all SMS and data charges for fraud alerts on major carriers (AT&T, Verizon, Sprint, T-Mobile), and alerts are strategically timed to avoid calling during late evening hours while maintaining 24/7 email notification capability. As a regional community bank, First National Bank of Falfurrias is best suited for customers in South Texas seeking local banking relationships and personalized service. However, the website provides limited detail on specific products, rates, fees, or account features, making it difficult to assess competitive offerings or full service breadth compared to larger institutions.
services: Debit cards with fraud alert protection
Automated fraud detection and alerts via text, email, and phone
In-branch customer service at South Texas locations
pros: Over 100 years of banking history and established community presence in South Texas
Automatic enrollment in fraud alert protection at no additional cost to customers
Bank absorbs all SMS and data charges for fraud alerts on major carriers (AT&T, Verizon, Sprint, T-Mobile)
24/7 email fraud alerts for customers traveling internationally
Mobile banking app available for convenient account access
Online financial calculators for loan payments, mortgages, retirement, and savings planning
Fraud account blocks can be removed within 5-10 minutes after customer validation
cons: Limited geographic footprint as a small regional bank serving only South Texas area
Website provides minimal information about specific account types, interest rates, or fee structures
Text and voice fraud alerts only available during limited hours (7 AM-10 PM for texts, 8 AM-9 PM for calls)
No information available about lending products, credit lines, or investment services
Website lacks details on account opening requirements, minimum balances, or online banking features

contact.address: 200 S Saint Marys St, Falfurrias, TX 78355

best_for: South Texas residents and businesses seeking community banking with local branch access
Customers prioritizing fraud protection and proactive transaction monitoring
Small business owners needing personalized commercial banking relationships
People who prefer traditional banking with mobile app convenience
diagnosis: First National Bank of Falfurrias is best for South Texas residents and small business owners seeking a traditional community banking relationship with emphasis on fraud protection. The main caveat is the bank's limited scope as a regional institution with minimal public information about specific products, rates, and services, making comparison shopping difficult for prospective customers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
